channel.title: publish on Sebastian Hoß
channel.description: Recent content in publish on Sebastian Hoß

item.title: Publish Hugo site with GitHub Actions
item.description: The peaceiris/actions-gh-pages action allows to publish a Hugo site in your GitHub Action. name:<PIPELINE>jobs:build:runs-on:<RUN_ON>steps:- name:Deploy Websiteuses:peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3with:github_token:${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}publish_dir:<PUBLISH_DIR>force_orphan:truecname:<CNAME> <PIPELINE>: The name of your pipeline. <RUN_ON>: The runner to use, see GitHub’s own documentation for possible values. <PUBLISH_DIR>: The file system location of the built site. <CNAME>: The CNAME of your custom domain.
